title: ♀ VENUS (Design) — Gate 45.4
content:
♀ VENUS (Design) — Gate 45.4
Theme: Gathering / Material Stewardship   Trait: You attract and manage resources.   Line 4: Tribe-based — you direct abundance toward your people.
♂ MARS (Personality) — Gate 4.4
Theme: Answers / Youthful Logic   Trait: Trial-and-error logic, especially when young.   Line 4: Requires emotional safety to express new logic to community.
♂ MARS (Design) — Gate 40.5
Theme: Work → Rest → Boundaries   Trait: Must have breaks between work output.   Line 5: Can teach others about sacred boundaries and work-life balance.
♃ JUPITER (Personality) — Gate 25.6
Theme: Innocence → Spirit Path   Trait: Grows by surrendering to purity and authentic spirit.   Line 6: Role model of higher love over time.
♃ JUPITER (Design) — Gate 54.2
Theme: Ambition → Material Rise   Trait: You climb naturally through alliances and vision.   Line 2: Your climb is elegant, but unconscious.
♄ SATURN (Personality) — Gate 21.4
Theme: Control / Sovereignty   Trait: Lessons around personal control vs shared power.   Line 4: Control best expressed in service to a group.
